content:
type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/filters.py
note: Finished with_counts param for sync_do_groupby/do_groupby. Added a new _GroupTupleWithCount NamedTuple (grouper, list, count) used only when with_counts=True, so the existing _GroupTuple (2-tuple) stays backward compatible for the default case (important: didn't want to add a 3rd optional field to _GroupTuple itself since that would break existing 2-value tuple unpacking in templates). My patch.txt is written and scoped to filters.py only. Go ahead and add case_sensitive whenever - just note I inserted with_counts as the last param in both signatures (after default), so if you also append case_sensitive as the last param we'll get a straightforward textual conflict at the signature/return lines when merged, which should be easy to resolve by hand.
